name: Mersey Point Marinated Herring Salad
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------------CREAM DRESSING-------------------------------
1 cup whipping cream
1 tablespoon white vinegar
1 teaspoon prepared mustard
1/2 teaspoon dried dillweed
1/4 teaspoon salt
1/4 teaspoon pepper
Combine salad ingredients in a large bowl. Divide into individual servings and allow each person to apply dressing as desired.
